text: G-CD-v2 (Goldilocks two-floor model): add a fixed per-trial overhead gamma, so C ~= gamma + alpha*n_calls + beta*n_reasoning_tokens. Ratios collapse to 1 at both ends - overhead-dominated at the easy end and search-depth-floor-dominated at the hard end - giving a V-shaped (non-monotonic) cost-ratio surface; granularity helps only at intermediate difficulty.
